title: The Infamous Miss Revell
writer: W. Carey Wonderly, Arthur J. Zellner
actors: Alice Lake, Cullen Landis, Jackie Saunders
plot: Twin sisters Julien and Paula Revell, compelled to support their younger brothers and sisters after the death of their father, are unable to get a booking for their musical act, and Julien accepts the "protection" of a man of wealth
